title: WoBlu's Enhanced Vanilla
description: A collection of Must-Have Vanilla+ mods for Minecraft!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb8dff52e5eb5270722ef2560a114cb115b3aabb.png)
# 📜 Description


A well researched, hand-picked selcection of Vanilla Enhancing mods.

# 🔃 Mod Loader



Currently only for the fabric mod loader. Forge port and Quilt planned for the future.




# **OPTIFINE ALTERNATIVE** 
Has most, if not all of Optifines features. Including: Shader support, Connected Textures, Zoom, and more.



# **PERFORMANCE**
WoBlu's Enhanced Vanilla features modern performance mods including: sodium, lithium, and others. WoBlu's Enhanced Vanilla ensures that no matter how potato quality your PC is, you can enjoy it.
